offer: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent vehicle maintenance causes compliance issues. We provide a fleet management system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on fleet management
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try vehicle maintenance logging on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the system
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance
Enable CSV import for existing maintenance data
